svg.title: The Burri Rules - Ivory Proof Plate
svg.text: Ivory proof plate · typed emergence, commitment, receipt, and composition
BR-2 · SIX CANDIDATE CROSSINGS + ONE NON-mu CLOSURE

g.text: r6 interpretive return · not identity · not mu6
modeling changes reachable choices, not c
authorized histories are a separate subset

svg.text: K_t may transform, veto, or distribute consequence
a_t = bottom -> null or ambient OutcomeReceipt (distinct cause)
Loop(M_t, G_t, q_t, r_t+1) revises M
receipt also revises G · not optional

g.text: no extra dimension · no mu/chi measurement identity
feedback sign is dynamical, not moral

svg.text: five trace tests · no consciousness or personhood presumed
[I] externally uncalibrated translation grammar · empirical crossings and universal-fit claims remain [C]
JSON mirrors owners; it cannot introduce doctrine or upgrade evidence
